description: Transform the Page Preview hover popover into a fully working editor instance.

manifest.name: Hover Editor

name: Hover Editor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Fix #333 - Ignoring source-mode canvas links

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fix #326 (Incompatibility w/Recent Files 1.7.4+)

Recent Files 1.7.4 and 1.7.5 refresh the recent files view on *every*
file-open event, which removes and replaces the item you're hovering
on, if you are using autofocus.  This update provides a workaround
to temporarily block the refresh, preventing the hover target from
being removed and replaced.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fix canvas mouse positioning issue (#325)

Thanks to @RobertttBS for reporting and creating a fix.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fix losing items from Recent Files w/autofocus on

Recent versions of the recent files plugin (1.7.1 and up) changed how it handled file-open events, breaking Hover Editor's workarounds for autofocus affecting the recent list.  This version adds a new workaround to support newer versions of the Recent Files plugin.

releases.description: ### Workaround for Obsidian 1.8 API breakage

releases.description: ### Respect auto-focus for "Open in hover editor"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Support docking w/vertical or other splits in main

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Restore header icons; allow full-size popovers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Add settings for footnotes, subheads, and blocks

You can now configure Hover Editor to *not* replace the built-in preview functions for links to footnotes, subheadings, and/or blocks.

By default, blocks and footnotes will now be displayed with the built-in preview (with Obsidian 1.6 and higher), but subheadings will still be displayed in Hover Editor. (For older Obsidians, the default will be to use Hover Editor for everything, since before 1.6 the built-in preview didn't support editing.)

You can change these settings from the defaults using the plugin's settings page.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Make fix for #274 work in non-main windows

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Fix #274: instructions not on 1.6 Quick Switcher

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Minor styling fix for Obsidian 1.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Support canvas note cards popup via keyboard

You can now use the "Open current file in new popover" command while
editing a note embedded in a canvas, and have that note pop up
instead of getting a popup of the canvas itself.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Allow opening non-markdown files from command

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Track more layers for natual stacking (fixes #32)

Previously, Hover Editor only kept track of three layers: one for new popups, one for the active/focused popup, and one for all other popups (in creation order).

This update increases the number of tracked layers so that you can restack popups in a way that keeps their ordering, up to
around 10 or 12 popups.  (Popups that have been touched less recently than the most-recent dozen will be on the same layer
with each other.  This is because Obsidian's theming layers do not include enough z-order space between popups and modals;
adding more layers would hide the popups under things or put them over things they shouldn't be over.)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Fix #176 - highlight when hovering search result

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fix #227 - Fold state being lost on editor hide

When hovering a link, but *not* long enough to open it, closing the not-yet-shown pane would cause Obsidian to try to save the fold state, which was not yet loaded because the pane wasn't shown.  This change blocks Obsidian from saving fold state when Hover Editor is closing a pane that was never shown.  This should prevent fold state being lost in such cases.

releases.description: ### Experimental fix for Obsidian scroll jump issues

releases.description: ### Workaround hover event issues w/Bookmarks

releases.description: ### Support 1.3.0 (and PDF viewer)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Misc. Compatibility fixes for 1.0

Hover editors now (mostly) work correctly with 1.0 tabs and view headers.

* Fix #170 - Maximize doesn't fill the workspace
* Fix #184 - Docking doesn't add a tab
* Fix #186 - Scrolling to middle or end when opened in edit mode

Unpinned hover editors can close while mousing over a native menu.
Disable native menus (in Obsidian Settings > Appearance > Advanced)
as a workaround for the time being.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Fix #183 - Embeds not triggered in Obsidian 0.16+

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor style fixes for 1.0, and fix closing popups in main window when a secondary window is closed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Don't ask for focus from other apps (Fix #160)

(Also, don't let Obsidian auto-focus our panes when auto-focus is off)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix edit view and focusing issues w/0.15.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix switching to main window on hover in popouts on 0.15.6  (This was causing popovers to close immediately after opening.)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Improved compatibility with Obsidian 0.15.6

This version should fix some issues with opening things in Hover Editors in Obsidian 0.15.6.  Because of the invasive changes required to make these things work, this is being released as a beta first.  Please report any issues!

(Also, if you are using Pane Relief with this beta, be sure to update it to 0.2.0 or higher first.)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fix some commands/actions not working in popouts

(`instanceof` doesn't work properly with DOM nodes or events in popoout windows, so e.g. maximizing didn't work in popout windows; this change works around it in a way that's backward compatible with Obsidian 0.14.)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Don't close editor if mouse is over a suggestion (Fix #144)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Compatibility with 0.15.3 and the latest Pane Relief

This is the first public (non-beta) version released for compatibility with the Obsidian 0.15.3 Insider build.  (It also works with older Obsidian versions back to 0.14.5.)

- When used with Obsidian 0.15.3, it allows you to drag hover editors' contents to other windows,
- When used with Pane Relief's new "maximize" feature, you can also maximize/restore hover editors and main area panes with a single command, and not worry about the main area disappearing when a hover editor is focused.  (This feature is available in older Obsidian versions and does not require 0.15.3)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Handle upcoming changes to how pane dragging/docking works in 0.15.x

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fix boundary detection in secondary windows so that you can't resize hover editors off the screen

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes to improve compatibility with the latest insider builds

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Initial beta to support the new multi window support available in Obsidian 0.15.x
  - Hover Editors can now be spawned inside of new windows and behave the same as they do in the main window
  - Big thanks to @pjeby for doing all of the work to make this possible!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Don't orphan popovers when ws changes (Fix #109)
- Don't create a new leaf when clicking the "create new file" button (Fix #114)
- Add a new setting to enable triggering Hover Editor when hovering over rendered embeds
- Added an additional key handler to try and prevent mod key based keyboard shortcuts from accidentally spawning Hover Editors

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed a bug that was not setting the hover preview source mode properly for previews triggered on embeds

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Hover Editors can now be triggered from any type of internal embed in both live preview and reading modes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed an issue where you couldn't issue the "snap to x" commands to toggle quickly between left, right, viewport

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add commands to "Snap active Hover Editor to <left|right|viewport>"
- Add commands to "Restore active Hover Editor" and "Minimize active Hover Editor"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add a command and context menu item to "Dock Hover Editor to workspace"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add a command and context menu item to "Convert pane to Hover Editor". Implements #104 and #95

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Enabled the plugin to be installed on mobile
  - Most things work on mobile currently but not much work has been done to optimize the mobile experience yet

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue that was causing popovers to close unexpectedly when running an older version of the Obsidian installer
- If you spawn a popover from a link and pin it, you can now spawn additional popovers from that same link
- Prevent popovers from trying to automatically open files externally that are not supported by Obsidian
- Additional improvements when spawning popovers from the Calendar plugin

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Lots of back-end changes to the popover creation and tracking system
- Opening popovers from live preview and Calendar plugin elements should be more stable
- Auto focus now works on popovers opened from Calendar elements
- Resolves issues related to opening a modal while having an unpinned popover active. Fixes #94
- Fixed issues where unpinned popovers could close while trying to open and navigate a menu

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added a new feature that maximizes the hover editor window when clicking and holding on any image inside of the popover. When letting go of the mouse button, the popover will restore back to its normal size
- Added a new keyboard shortcut to the quick switcher (ctrl/cmd+p) to open a file in a new popover
- Fixed an issue where auto focus would sometimes not work properly
- Removed the notice that popped up when the Page Preview plugin was disabled
- Fixed a bug that was auto enabling Page Preview even if it was explicitly disabled

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed an issue that was causing exceptions when the "show view header by default" setting was enabled

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Added the bouncing popovers feature

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue where the accidental popover prevention wasn't working well when "auto pin" was enabled
- It should be more difficult to accidentally open popovers
- Added the `.hover-editor` class to the popover container so that theme developers can differentiate hover editors from native popovers
- Updated CSS styles to use `.popover.hover-editor` instead of `.popover.hover-popover`
- Fixed an issue that was causing sliding panes to readjust panes when opening a hover editor and giving it focus
- Fixed an issue that was causing the recent files plugin to jump around when invoking popovers from the files in the recent file list

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Hover Editors invoked by hovering over an image link/file will auto size the popover using the image's natural dimensions
  - If the image is larger than the viewport, the popover will be resized to fit the viewport
  - When an image view is loaded, the popover will constrain its aspect ratio while resizing
- When invoked by hovering over a PDF, the popover will auto size itself to 800x600 similar to the native hover popover behavior
- Prevent popovers from auto closing when invoked via an image embed in Live Preview
- Added the CSS variable `--he-view-header-height` for setting the view header height. If themes want to change the view header height, this variable must be used.
- Added the data attribute `data-active-view-type` to the `.hover-editor` container which will contain the view type of the currently active hover editor pane.
  - For example, when loading an image, the attribute will be `data-active-view-type="image"` or when loaded a markdown view `data-active-view-type="markdown"`
- Added the data attribute `data-leaf-count=#` to the  `.hover-editor` container which will indicate the number of panes currently loaded in the popover.
  - This should make it easier to conditionally style the popover if only a single pane is open. Especially useful when used in conjunction with `data-active-view-type`
- When using the Hider plugin to hide the sidebar ribbon, snapping a popover to the left edge will no longer leave an empty gap

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fix issue that was preventing auto focus from placing the cursor properly into new editor instances
- Fix issue that was preventing popovers invoked via the calendar plugin when using auto focus
  - For now, auto focus is ignored for popovers invoked via the calendar plugin
- Fixed issue that was causing event handler leakage when popovers closed before appearing on screen
  - Probably best to restart Obsidian to be sure any old handlers are discarded

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Focus hover editors properly when invoked via command

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- A new title bar has been added to hover editors
	- The standard view header is now hidden by default and accessible via the "show view header" icon to the left of the minimize button
	- There a plugin setting you can enable if you want the view header shown by default
- The Hover Editor title bar now has window controls such as minimize, maximize, restore, and close
- Thanks again to @pjeby, you can now drag Hover Editor leaves and move them to a new new parent. The new parent can be another Hover Editor or any part of the native Obsidian workspace.
	- This works the other way around as well, allowing you to drag native Obsidian leaves into a Hover Editor
- Style Settings have been added to allow customization of many aspects of the new title bar
- Multiple CSS variables have added to make it easier for Theme Developers to style this new element

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description: - Fixed a bug that was causing the graph view to load in the background on startup and not get cleaned up

releases.author: nothingislost
nothingislost
releases.description:
- Added the ability to snap popovers to the left/right/top edges
  - Snapping to the left/right will anchor the popover to the respective edge and maximize the popover vertically
  - Snapping to the top will maximize the popover within the viewport
  - The popover can be dragged away from the edge to restore the popover to its original dimensions
  - This feature is disabled by default but can be turned on within the plugin settings
- The initial dimensions for a popover can now be customized within the plugin settings
- The auto close delay can now be customized within the plugin settings
- Improved the logic which constrains the popover to the visible viewport

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Additional tweaks to the popover viewport constraint logic
  - You can now drag popovers almost all the way off the screen to the left or right
  - You can drag popovers off the screen towards the bottom but it will prevent you from moving the popover header out of the viewport
  - When dragging or resizing towards the top it will stop you once you get to the title bar or left/right edges

releases.author: nothingislost
nothingislost
releases.description:
- Embiggened the popover resize handles to make them easier to target
- Fixed an issue where a popover would not restore properly after minimizing and changing the width of the minimized popover
- @pjeby improved the file open logic so that popovers will properly update the state of components like local graph, backlinks, etc when opened

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Allow resizing from left/right/bottom popover sides
- Adjust resize handles to be easier to target
- Animate the pin icon slightly when activated to make it clearer when auto pinning occurs
- Reduce the opacity of popovers slightly when being dragged
- Adjust the logic that populates the recently opened file list
  - If a popover has been given focus manually, file open events will show up in the recent file list

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Further improvements in preparation for allowing hover panes to coexist with native panes
- Pane linking is now possible between hover editors or between a hover editor and a native workspace pane
- Opening components like the local graph within a popover now properly creates the component inside of the popover
- Thanks again to @pjeby for all of these enhancements

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Further improvements to popovers with multiple splits
- The pin icon now behaves properly with multiple popover splits
- Selection history is now properly kept across popover and native panes
  - Fixes #14 
- Thanks again to @pjeby for these contributions!

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Popovers now support being split just like normal workspace panes
  - Thanks to @pjeby for enabling this capability!

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Add "open in new popover" context menu command to items
  - This allows you to right click links or nav bar tab icons (like the graph) and open them in a new popover
  - Thanks to [Boninall](https://github.com/Quorafind) for the contribution!

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Allow for multiple popovers on certain components that weren't working previously such as the graph view and quick explorer
- Allow for popover on unresolved graph nodes
- The uncreated file popover now allows for keyboard input to activate the create file button
- The "Open link under cursor in new popover" command will now auto create files which do not yet exist
- Popovers opened using "Create new popover" will now receive focus so that the "Go to file" command and other commands requiring focus will work properly
- Thanks to @pjeby for the feedback and contributions on many of these improvements!

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- When spawning a new popover, clicking anywhere outside of the popover will cause the popover to hide unless the popover is pinned
  - This fixes issues where a popover could appear while dragging an item and cause visibility problems
  - Addresses #20
- Keyboard commands now properly set the new popover as the active leaf and sets focus when possible
   - Addresses #22
-  Fixed a few exceptions caused due to race conditions when rapidly opening/closing popovers
   - Addresses #23

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Add support for auto scrolling to location when hovering over backlinks or other elements which pass a line number
- Fix improper unsetting of activeLeaf when closing a popover that is not the currently active leaf
- Close all active popovers on unload

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- The hover editor can now be opened while hovering over links to files that do not yet exist
- The hover editor will now spawn under more scenarios such as when using Quick Explorer

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description: - Fix issue preventing popovers on graph nodes

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Removed leftover debug logic
- Fixed empty popovers not showing a header when using Minimal theme
- Set cursor focus to newly created popovers if the "auto focus" setting is enabled and the default mode is Editing mode

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
### New Features
- Added a setting to minimize/restore popovers downwards
	- This allows you to drag minimized popovers down to the bottom of the viewport and quickly expand/collapse them while maintaining their vertical position
- Added a new command "Open link under cursor in new popover" to allow for keyboard users to spawn popovers
- Added a new command "Open current file in new popover"
- Added a new command "Open new popover" which opens an empty popover
- When using the Pane Relief plugin, Popovers will maintain their own forward/backward history

### Enhancements
- Added the .is-new class to newly opened popovers
  - This class sets the z-index to ensure new popovers always show up on top
  - The class will auto remove upon clicking anywhere within the app
- Reduced the chances of accidentally opening a popover when ctrl+clicking on a link
- Added the class .is-minimized to the .hover-popover when minimized
- Fixed a bug that was preventing custom trigger delays from working properly
- It is no longer possible to accidentally hide popovers when resizing the main obsidian window
	- Popovers will be forced to stay within the bounds of the viewport while resizing

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Added a setting to change the hover delay
- Added a setting to control the auto pin behavior
- Added a setting to control the auto focus behavior
- Fixed an issue that was preventing ctrl+click to open in a new pane
- Prevented popovers from adding themselves to the document history stack
- Prevented the popover window from being splittable
- Ctrl clicking links within a popover will now open the link in the native root split rather than splitting the popover
- Improved the popover behavior when rapidly spawning new popovers
- Reduced the likelihood of accidental popovers

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description: - Now plays nicely with Sliding Panes

releases.author: nothingislost
releases.description:
- Fix auto scrolling to header/block ref location when opening in edit mode
- Fix issue with active leaf/focus when opening popovers rapidly
